query: what's the best chart in power bi to show same-store sales growth year over year for our 240 grocery stores?
why: Retail same-store sales metric needing a Power BI visual recommendation - core scope.

query: I have a POS fact table at line-item grain and a Product dim (SKU->Brand->Category). How should I visualize top selling categories vs last quarter?
why: Retail POS/product hierarchy question mapped to a Power BI visual - target skill.

query: need to build a dashboard showing promotion lift - which products sold more during the coupon/display campaign vs no promo baseline
why: Retail promotion/causal-dimension lift visualization - squarely in scope.

query: how do i show sell-through and on-hand inventory by store without double counting the daily snapshots in power bi
why: Retail inventory snapshot (semi-additive) visual + DAX guidance is a core use case.

query: build me a report for our online store: conversion rate, basket size, and cart abandonment from the clickstream sessions table
why: Ecommerce/clickstream retail metrics visualization - explicitly in scope.

query: what visual works for GMROI by department and how do i write the measure for gross margin return on inventory
why: Retail-specific GMROI metric and visual/DAX - target skill territory.

query: our merchandising team wants to see which SKUs are slow movers and at risk of markdown - how to chart that
why: Retail product/inventory slow-mover analysis needing a visual, no feature named but clearly retail viz.

query: i want a viz comparing average ticket size and units per transaction across our specialty apparel stores
why: Retail POS basket/ticket metrics visualization - in scope.

query: how do I display weekly footfall-to-purchase conversion and attachment rate for the seasonal toy department before black friday
why: Uncommon-but-valid retail store conversion/attachment-rate visualization request.

query: ops wants to see promo lift broken down - should I use Key Influencers or Decomposition Tree to find what drove the sales spike during our BOGO sale?
why: Retail context but the ask is which AI visual to pick -> ai-powered-analysis-selection.

query: my retail sales report has a Margin % measure summing wrong across product categories - facts are extended cost and gross profit dollars
why: Root concern is non-additive ratio aggregation -> understanding-fact-additivity.

query: i need YTD and same-period-last-year sales for our stores plus a 13-week moving average measure in DAX
why: Despite retail data, the need is period-over-period/moving-avg DAX -> applying-time-intelligence.

query: connect my POS data sitting in a SQL Server warehouse - should I use DirectQuery or Import for the daily inventory snapshots and how do I schedule refresh?
why: Connectivity/storage-mode/refresh question -> connecting-data-sources.

query: store managers should only see their own store's sales rows in the retail dashboard - how do I set that up?
why: Per-store data restriction is row-level security -> securing-row-level-access.

query: i want users to click a product category on my retail chart and drill through to the individual POS transactions on another page
why: Mechanic asked is drill-through pattern -> drill-pattern-design.

query: the Product dimension from our retail ERP has merged SKU and brand columns and trailing spaces - how do I split and clean it in power query before reporting?
why: Data shaping/cleaning in Power Query (M) -> transforming-data-power-query.

query: lay out an executive retail scorecard - what visuals top vs bottom and how to organize sales, inventory, and ecommerce KPIs for a one-page exec view
why: Multi-visual layout for an audience -> dashboard-composition.

query: how do I write the CALCULATE measure for net profit excluding markdown sales, with a filter on the Promotion table?
why: Pure DAX measure authoring with CALCULATE/filter context -> authoring-dax-measures.

query: my retail sales model with 80M POS rows is super slow to render the matrix - how do I speed it up?
why: Performance tuning of a large model/slow report -> optimizing-model-performance.

query: i need a pixel-perfect printable weekly store sales statement to mail to franchise owners with exact margins and page breaks
why: Printable RDL paginated report -> building-paginated-reports.
